recipes.name: @patchworkos/morning-brief
recipes.description: Daily 6am digest: Gmail unread, Linear assigned issues, Slack DMs, and today's calendar — composed into one Slack message.

recipes.name: @patchworkos/incident-war-room
recipes.description: Ops incident response: summarize alert, open Linear issue, post to #incidents Slack, then append post-incident summary to Notion.

recipes.name: @patchworkos/sprint-review-prep
recipes.description: Pull completed Linear issues for the current sprint, summarize with AI, post digest to #engineering Slack channel.

recipes.name: @patchworkos/customer-escalation
recipes.description: Zendesk ticket escalation pipeline: fetch ticket, create linked Linear issue, alert #support-escalations on Slack.

recipes.name: @patchworkos/deal-won-celebration
recipes.description: HubSpot deal closed-won trigger: celebrate in #wins Slack, log deal details to a Notion database.
